Name: Rosewood Hong Kong
Tagline: Soaring over Victoria Harbour, Rosewood Hong Kong is a new centre of gravity on the Kowloon waterfront offering luxury accommodations & exquisite dining.
About: Its verticality reveals breathtaking views through some of the city’s largest windows—Kowloon’s cityscape, mountains peaks, the skyline and harbour waters​. A grand harbour corner where glittering panoramic waters meet refined luxury, and Manor Club privileges with personal butler service create tailored elegance.
Philosophy: Imbued with warmth and personality, dedicated service at Rosewood Hong Kong focuses on making guests' stays as smooth and enjoyable as possible, whether they are traveling for business or leisure. Each of Rosewood Hong Kong’s eleven dining concepts possesses a distinctive character, showcasing creativity and a contemporary interpretation of accessible gastronomy and refined beverage craft.
Outcomes: Rosewood Hong Kong has been recognized for its exceptional service and luxury, earning accolades in hospitality awards. Its wellness programs are praised for enhancing guest well-being, contributing to a prestigious reputation in the luxury hotel sector.
Admissions: To join Rosewood Hong Kong's wellness and lifestyle programs, guests can book directly through the hotel's website or contact the concierge. Availability may vary, so early inquiries are recommended to secure preferred dates and services.
Quote: Warm service, unforgettable moments – experience Hong Kong with Rosewood.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Rosewood Hong Kong's wellness experts possess international certifications in holistic health and luxury hospitality, with staff trained in renowned institutions like the International Spa Association. Their expertise ensures a world-class wellness experience for guests.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Rosewood Hong Kong offers comprehensive wellness programs, including mindfulness workshops and personalized fitness regimes, fostering mental and physical health. Their dedicated wellness concierge ensures tailored support for each guest's unique needs.
Performance.Academic Integration: While not an academic institution, Rosewood Hong Kong integrates educational elements into its wellness programs, offering workshops on mindfulness and stress management, beneficial for students from local and international schools in Hong Kong.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Rosewood Hong Kong's wellness programs have been acclaimed in luxury hospitality awards, reflecting their excellence in enhancing guest experiences. Their holistic approach supports personal growth and professional development in the luxury sector.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The hotel boasts state-of-the-art wellness facilities, including a luxurious spa, fitness center, and yoga studio, offering panoramic views of Victoria Harbour. These spaces are designed to enhance relaxation and rejuvenation.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Rosewood Hong Kong maintains high standards through regular guest feedback and quality reviews, ensuring continuous improvement. Their commitment to excellence is reinforced by adherence to international luxury hospitality benchmarks.
